notes:
# ATSYS — QR Attendance System
## Release Notes · v3.6.2
**Date:** April 2026 · **By:** ATH Studios

---

## What's New

### ⚡ Update Flow — Speed & Visibility Fixes

- **Instant dialog** — The download window now appears and fully renders on screen *before* any network request is made. Previously the app appeared frozen for up to 10 seconds while silently contacting GitHub.
- **8× faster downloads** — Read buffer increased from 64 KB → 512 KB per chunk, significantly improving throughput especially on high-latency connections.
- **Animated progress bar** — Starts as a moving marquee while connecting, then switches to a live percentage bar once the file size is known.
- **Live speed indicator** — Shows real-time download speed (e.g. `↓ 2.4 MB/s`) so teachers can confirm the download is actively progressing and haven't just stared at a frozen screen.
- **Non-blocking connection check** — The server availability check (HEAD request) was moved into the background thread so the main window no longer freezes while it runs.
